data.title: Bernstein: Ethereum's surge is driven by institutional interest and Layer 2 demand
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bernstein analysts reported on Wednesday that Ethereum has seen an astonishing increase in the past week (a 42% increase in 7 days), mainly because in addition to value storage, the actual value of digital assets has been more recognized, and institutions and retail investors have become increasingly interested in blockchain and stablecoin payments. On the technical level, the Pectra upgrade completed on May 8 improved the efficiency of network operation. In terms of application, the issuance of stablecoins on the Ethereum chain accounts for 51%. Stripe recently launched a corporate stablecoin account service, and Meta also restarted the stablecoin project. The report mentioned that Robinhood plans to launch a tokenized stock service on Ethereum Layer2 and has completed a $179 million acquisition of Layer2 exchange WonderFi. The advancement of the US stablecoin regulatory bill also provides the market with a clearer policy environment. Analysts pointed out that the continued use of ETH to pay for Gas fees on the Layer2 network will form long-term demand support. (Decrypt)

data.title: Animoca Brands makes strategic investment in UXLINK
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News UXLINK announced that after Animoca Ventures, Animoca Brands has become its new strategic investor. The head of the UXLINK community said that Animoca Brands' investment will help UXLINK build a new Web3 social model through AI Growth Agent, which is expected to benefit hundreds of millions of social accounts and corporate accounts in the future. At the same time, UXLINK will connect crypto assets with the real world through the PayFi ecosystem, promote the combination of Web3 and Web2, and create a new lifestyle. It is reported that UXLINK is the world's largest Web3 social infrastructure platform, with about 800,000 daily active users, and its ecosystem supports more than 90,000 Web3 communities.

data.title: BTC Price At Risk Of Sliding Below $100,000 As Demand Slows Down
data.description:
Key Insights: Bitcoin demonstrated waning demand above $104,000 as evident by its sideways price action in the last 6 days. As a result, investors were concerned about the risks of price potentially dipping below $100,000. Among the key reasons for those concerns was the steady drop in Bitcoin dominance in the last 7 days
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/14/btc-price-at-risk-of-sliding-below-100000-as-demand-slows-down/

data.title: Gate.io Alpha Launches PRAI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io Alpha has launched Privasea AI (PRAI) and launched a limited-time airdrop event from 22:00 on May 14, 2025 to 22:00 on May 17, 2025 (UTC+8). During the event, you can get airdrop rewards by completing your first transaction on Alpha (regardless of currency) or any PRAI transaction, with a total prize pool of 600,000 PRAI.

data.title: Solana Network Leads Global DEX Trading Volume with Significant Weekly Growth
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from DefiLlama reveals that Solana's network decentralized exchange (DEX) trading volume reached $45.71 billion in the past 24 hours, ranking first globally. Additionally, over the past week, Solana's DEX trading volume totaled $275.15 billion, marking a 48% increase.

The top three DEX protocols within the Solana ecosystem are Raydium, Meteora, and Orca, contributing significantly to this impressive performance.

data.title: Nous Research Launches Decentralized AI Training Network
data.description:
According to Foresight News, open-source AI company Nous Research has announced the launch of its decentralized AI training network, Psyche. This initiative aims to aggregate global computing resources to train advanced AI models. The Psyche test network went live today and will pre-train a large language model with 40 billion parameters, laying the groundwork for future open scientific research.

Previously, Foresight News reported, citing Fortune, that Paradigm invested $50 million in Nous Research, valuing the company at $1 billion in tokens.

data.title: Trump’s tax bill comeback is a middle-class disaster
data.description:
House Republicans approved Trump’s tax plan in committee, pushing forward major tax breaks.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tax-bill-comeback-is-a-middle-class-disaster/

data.title: Canaan Technology: 87 BTC mined in April, total Bitcoin holdings increased to 1,424
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed Canaan Inc. released an unaudited Bitcoin mining update report as of April 30, 2025, which disclosed that mining produced 87 BTC in April, the total Bitcoin holdings increased to 1,424, and the deployed hash rate reached 8.15 EH/s at the end of the month. In addition, Canaan Inc. disclosed that its Ethiopian mine had a minor power outage in April, but the normal operation time was still 95%.

data.title: Regulatory experts warn US crypto laws may stagnate until 2029 without GENIUS stablecoin bill
data.description:
15-5-2025 – Regulatory experts warn of a potential decade-long stagnation in American cryptocurrency legislation, with reforms possibly delayed until 2029, should lawmakers fail to advance the crucial GENIUS stablecoin legislation. The antiquated state of US digital asset regulation, which remarkably still draws upon pre-war financial frameworks from eight decades ago, has drawn sharp criticism from [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/regulatory-experts-warn-us-crypto-laws-may-stagnate-until-2029-without-genius-stablecoin-bill/

data.title: Gate.io CandyDrop Launches GET Airdrop Event
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io officially announced that its CandyDrop platform will launch the Global Entertainment Token (GET) airdrop event from 19:00 on the same day to 23:59 on May 28 (UTC+8). Users can share a total of approximately 6,000,000 GET prize pools by participating in GET spot transactions. It is reported that the threshold for participation in the event is that the GET spot trading volume reaches 200 USDT. Both new and old users can participate, and a single person can receive up to 40,000 GET rewards. Gate.io stated that this event is fair and open, and aims to provide users with the opportunity to acquire high-quality assets. GET is a token project focused on the entertainment industry, aiming to connect fans and creators through blockchain technology.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 103,000 USDT with a 0.74% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 15, 2025, 01:56 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 103,000 USDT and is now trading at 102,987 USDT, with a narrowed 0.74% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 650 USDT with a 2.31% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 15, 2025, 01:38 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 650 USDT and is now trading at 649.609985 USDT, with a narrowed 2.31% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Blockstream CEO: Bitcoin could rise to $500,000 to $1 million in this cycle
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Adam Back, CEO of blockchain company Blockstream, said that considering the continued inflow of institutional funds and the improvement of the policy environment, Bitcoin's current price of $103,000 is significantly undervalued. He believes that Bitcoin could rise to $500,000 to $1 million during this cycle. Back pointed out that the US Bitcoin spot ETF has attracted more than $41 billion in net inflows, and coupled with the Trump administration's crypto-friendly policies, market fundamentals are significantly better than in previous years. （Decrypt）

data.title: BitMart founder Sheldon: The platform is actively promoting the tokenization of traditional financial assets such as stocks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart founder Sheldon revealed on the X platform that BitMart is actively promoting the tokenization of traditional financial assets, covering assets such as stocks, stock indexes, foreign exchange, gold, as well as market maker funds and collateral. Sheldon said that in the future, users will be able to trade these tokenized assets on the BitMart platform and its upcoming digital wallet. Previously, Sheldon forwarded the news that JPMorgan Chase completed the first tokenized treasury bond transaction using Chainlink and Ondo technology. With the acceleration of traditional financial assets on the chain, the potential of blockchain technology in improving liquidity, transparency and decentralized transactions has become increasingly prominent, which may bring new growth opportunities to the global financial market.

data.title: eToro jumps 30% on Nasdaq debut after upsized IPO
data.description:
Crypto and stock trading platform eToro has seen its share price gain nearly 30% during its debut on the Nasdaq after the company made a last-minute boost to its initial public offering. Shares in eToro Group Ltd (ETOR) closed May 14 trading at $67, up 28. 9% from its initial offering price of $52, according to Yahoo Finance. It brings the company’s market value to over $5
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/etoro-jumps-30-percent-nasdaq-debut-upsized-ipo?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ukraine set to make Bitcoin history with first European strategic reserve
data.description:
Ukraine is drafting a law to create the first European Strategic Bitcoin Reserve.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ukraine-eyes-bitcoin-strategic-reserve/

data.title: Crypto startups scaring away VCs with 80x valuations: 10T Holdings
data.description:
Too many crypto startups are pricing themselves out of venture capital funding by chasing valuations far exceeding their revenues, according to Dan Tapeiro, the CEO of crypto-focused venture capital firm 10T Holdings. “For some reason, founders and CEOs think that they should be raising capital at 50 to 80 times revenue. So that makes it very hard for us to make a return for our liquidity providers,” Tapeiro said while speaking in a panel discussion at the Consensus conference in Toronto on May 14. “So a lot of those deals we just pass almost automatically, even businesses that we really like, we won't invest in if the price isn't reasonable in the beginning
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-startup-80x-valuations-push-away-vc-funding?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
